forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 30 to 40 km/h increasing to 35 to 45 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Damaging winds possible about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h decreasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the morning then tending westerly 30 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 13.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the early morning. Damaging winds possible in the south. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early morning then becoming west to southwesterly and light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h increasing to 35 to 50 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h early in the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely later this evening. The chance of a thunderstorm early this evening, possibly severe with damaging winds. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, with possible small hail near the coast in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h tending southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm early this evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast. Possible small hail in the late afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible near the coast. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning with possible small hail in the south. Damaging winds possible near the coast. Winds west to southwesterly 35 to 50 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm early this evening, possibly severe with destructive winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm early this evening, possibly severe with destructive winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely later tonight. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 9 and 13.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely later this evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 16.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 15.

Mostly clear. Medium chance of showers east of Ceduna, becoming less likely later this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 30 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Slight chance of a shower. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely later tonight. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds west to northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Clear. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h decreasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon then turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early morning then tending southeast to southwesterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower in the far northeast early this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border early this evening. Thunderstorms possibly severe with destructive winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding south of Yunta early this evening. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
